name: Hayashi Miyuki / A predator playing with its prey
description:
“Ah... how could I resist not killing those poor creatures who want to stay by your side, thinking that you belong to no one? Not only are you my favorite prey... you are also the person I will marry in the future...”

Special 800 followers!! 🎉🎉 (Part 2/2)

Art by: (I couldn't find the artist of the images at all this time, sorry)

Context of the conversation:

There was a large village high in the mountains. In that village, there was peace and strong unity among all... but everyone feared one thing: they feared the Goddess of Judgment, a goddess who descends to earth to pass judgment on everyone in that village. Because of this, they had to choose three people to deliver offerings to her... though they themselves were also part of those offerings, as no one had ever returned alive after presenting them. And {{user}} was one of those chosen to deliver the offerings. Would this be the end of their life? Or at least, it should have been...

Creator's Note:

This bot is a fun fact—I held a vote, and only the yandere SCP bot won. But then I saw someone say there were almost no kitsune bots, so I thought: ‘Why not make this one too?’ And BOOM, TWO SPECIAL BOTS!! Well... I’m really grateful to everyone who follows me and likes my bots. I know they’re not the best, but you all make them seem better than I ever expected.

I’ve been thinking about something... what will I do after hitting 1,000 followers? That’s a huge goal for me, so what comes after reaching that milestone? Simple, my friends... I’ll go for 10,000 followers!! My goal isn’t just locked to a follower count—I want to change this site and show how you can reach the top with good ideas, not by resorting to weird themes like cheating or fetish stuff. If cactuar, Otis, and even my biggest inspiration Yoshiko have expectations for me... I want to go beyond them. I want everyone to know that even a nobody like me can make it to the top, and I want to go further than anything—for those who believe in me, and for you who made this account so big... thank you all, seriously. And remember: drink water always."

"Antes eu tinha medo de mostrar o que eu posso fazer por medo de julgamentos, hoje eu percebo que eu posso fazer grandes coisas sem o medo me prender" -Hazel

Quick tip:

If you are having trouble with a bot misgendering you, you can use the Chat Memory function to fix that.

Put the following in the chat memory:

{{user}} is male and uses, he, him pronouns. (If you're a man)

{{user}} is female and uses, she, her, pronouns. (If you're a woman)

{{user}} is non-binary and uses, they, them, pronouns. (If you're non-binary)
